node.statement: j ORDER-ISOMETRY: ||j(Phi-I)C|| = ||(Phi-I)C||. Derivation: by GT-hyp (H1) j is order-isometric, ||jM||=||M|| for every linear operator M (left-composition with the order-isometric embedding j preserves the operator norm). Apply with M=(Phi-I)C: ||j(Phi-I)C|| = ||(Phi-I)C||. (This is an EQUALITY, sharper than the submultiplicative bound ||j(Phi-I)C||<=||j||_op*||(Phi-I)C||=||(Phi-I)C||; order-isometry upgrades it to equality, which is what makes the defect inheritance tight with the SAME constant.) Uses GT-hyp.
